faqs.question: What is Kafi Group?
faqs.answer: Kafi Group (Kafi Commodities Pvt. Ltd.) is a premier manufacturer and exporter of food products from Pakistan, operating since 1982. Our in-house brand 'Essence' covers rice, Himalayan pink salt, spices, desserts, vermicelli, and more.
faqs.answerUrdu: Kafi Group (Kafi Commodities Pvt. Ltd.) 1982 se Pakistan se food products ki manufacturing aur export kar raha hai. Hamara in-house brand 'Essence' hai.

faqs.question: Where is Kafi Group located?
faqs.answer: Our head office is at Kafi House, F-50/1, Block-8, KDA Scheme-5, Clifton, Karachi, Pakistan. Our factory is located on Hub River Road, Karachi.
faqs.answerUrdu: Hamara head office Clifton, Karachi mein hai aur factory Hub River Road, Karachi par hai.

faqs.question: What certifications does Kafi Group have?
faqs.questionUrdu: کافی گروپ کے پاس کون سے سرٹیفیکیشنز ہیں؟
faqs.answer: We are certified with ISO 9001 (Quality Management), ISO 22000 (Food Safety), HACCP (Hazard Analysis), and HALAL certification. We are also members of REAP (Rice Exporters Association of Pakistan).
faqs.answerUrdu: Hamare paas ISO 9001, ISO 22000, HACCP aur HALAL certifications hain.

faqs.question: Which countries do you export to?
faqs.questionUrdu: آپ کن ممالک کو برآمد کرتے ہیں؟
faqs.answer: We export to the Middle East, Asia, Europe, North America (Canada & USA), Africa, and the Far East. We serve a diverse global clientele.
faqs.answerUrdu: Hum Middle East, Asia, Europe, North America, Africa aur Far East ko export karte hain.

faqs.question: How do I place an order?
faqs.answer: You can place an order by contacting us via email at exports@kafi-group.com, calling +92-300-8206633, or reaching us on WhatsApp. We provide custom quotations based on your requirements.
faqs.answerUrdu: Aap email (exports@kafi-group.com), phone (+92-300-8206633) ya WhatsApp ke zariye order de sakte hain. Hum aapki zaroorat ke mutabiq quotation dete hain.

faqs.question: What are your prices?
faqs.answer: As a B2B exporter, our pricing is customized based on order quantity, destination, and product specifications. Please contact our exports team at exports@kafi-group.com or WhatsApp +92-300-8206633 for a quotation.
faqs.answerUrdu: Hamare rates order ki quantity aur destination ke mutabiq hote hain. Quotation ke liye exports@kafi-group.com par email karein ya WhatsApp karein.

faqs.question: Do you offer private labeling?
faqs.questionUrdu: کیا آپ پرائیویٹ لیبلنگ کرتے ہیں؟
faqs.answer: Yes! We offer comprehensive private labeling, OEM services, and contract manufacturing. You can have your own brand on our premium products. Contact us for details.
faqs.answerUrdu: Ji haan! Hum private labeling, OEM services aur contract manufacturing offer karte hain.

faqs.question: What is the minimum order quantity?
faqs.questionUrdu: کم سے کم آرڈر کتنا ہونا چاہیے؟
faqs.answer: Minimum order quantities vary by product. Please contact our exports team for specific MOQ details for your desired products.
faqs.answerUrdu: Minimum order har product ke liye alag hota hai. Hamare exports team se rabta karein.

faqs.question: Where does your pink salt come from?
faqs.questionUrdu: آپ کا گلابی نمک کہاں سے آتا ہے؟
faqs.answer: Our Himalayan Pink Salt is sourced directly from the Khewra Salt Mine in Pakistan — one of the oldest and largest salt mines in the world. It is 100% natural, unrefined, and free from bleaching agents or anti-caking additives.
faqs.answerUrdu: Hamara Himalayan Pink Salt Pakistan ki Khewra Salt Mine se aata hai — duniya ki sab se purani aur bari salt mines mein se ek. 100% qudrati aur ghair processed.

faqs.question: Where does your rice come from?
faqs.questionUrdu: آپ کا چاول کہاں سے آتا ہے؟
faqs.answer: Our rice is sourced from premium paddy fields in the Punjab province of Pakistan, known for producing the finest Basmati rice in the world.
faqs.answerUrdu: Hamara chawal Pakistan ke Punjab ke behtareen khet se aata hai, jo duniya ka sab se aala Basmati rice paida karta hai.

faqs.question: What is the shelf life of your products?
faqs.questionUrdu: آپ کی مصنوعات کتنے دن چلتی ہیں؟
faqs.answer: Shelf life varies by product: Custard and dessert mixes have a 12-month shelf life. Rice products have a longer shelf life when stored properly. Himalayan Pink Salt has an indefinite shelf life. Contact us for specific product shelf life details.
faqs.answerUrdu: Shelf life har product ke liye alag hai: Custard aur dessert mixes 12 mahine. Chawal sahih storage se zyada chalta hai. Himalayan Pink Salt hamesha chalta hai.

faqs.question: Do you have a product catalogue?
faqs.questionUrdu: کیا آپ کے پاس کوئی کیٹلاگ ہے؟
faqs.answer: Yes! You can view our complete Essence brand product catalogue online. We also have a detailed company profile PDF available for download.
faqs.answerUrdu: Ji haan! Aap hamara Essence brand ka complete catalogue online dekh sakte hain.
